title: Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 Out: Entrance Schedule, Exam Pattern & Syllabus

detail.title: Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 Out: Entrance Schedule, Exam Pattern & Syllabus
detail.short_info: Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 is out for the 2-year B.Ed entrance exam. Check exam schedule, eligibility, pattern, syllabus, exam centres and steps to download the SAMS Odisha B.Ed exam timetable from te.samsodisha.gov.in.

sections.heading: Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 Out: Entrance Schedule, Exam Pattern & Syllabus

content.text: Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 has been announced for admission to the 2-year B.Ed course for the 2026-27 session, and the detailed entrance schedule is available on the official website te.samsodisha.gov.in. The B.Ed entrance test will be organised for eligible graduates seeking admission into teacher education institutions under the Higher Education Department, Government of Odisha. Candidates should carefully note the exam date, reporting time and other instructions mentioned in the official information brochure.

sections.heading: Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 - Key Highlights

content.text: The SAMS Odisha B.Ed entrance exam is conducted every year for admission into the 2-year Bachelor of Education programme in recognised Teacher Education Institutions (TEIs) across the state. For the 2026-27 academic session, the exam date and related schedule have been notified under the B.Ed information brochure published on the SAMS Odisha Teacher Education portal.

rows: Student Academic Management System (SAMS), Higher Education Dept, Odisha
Offline OMR based (as per information brochure pattern)
As notified in the official B.Ed brochure 2026-27

sections.heading: Odisha B.Ed Exam Schedule 2026 - Important Dates

items: Application Period: The application process takes place from March 24, 2026, to April 10, 2026.
Application Correction: Candidates can correct their applications starting from April 7, 2026.
Admit Card Release: The admit cards will be released on May 27, 2026.
Exam Date: The B.Ed entrance exam is scheduled for May 31, 2026.
Result Declaration: Results are likely to be declared in July 2026.

content.text: The exam pattern is crucial for aspirants searching how to prepare for the SAMS Odisha B.Ed entrance.
Typically, the B.Ed entrance exam includes:

items: Objective type questions in OMR format.
Multiple sections covering language, general awareness, teaching aptitude and subject knowledge, as defined in the brochure.
Fixed number of questions and marks with a set duration, usually around 2 hours.
Marking scheme with positive marks for each correct answer and specific rules on negative marking, if applicable.

content.text: You can convert this into a small table:

rows: As per structure defined in brochure
Yes/ No as per official rules

content.text: Including eligibility keeps the article evergreen for both exam date and application related searches.
Key points you can derive from the B.Ed brochure:

items: Educational Qualification Candidates must hold a Bachelor degree (Arts / Science / Commerce or equivalent) from a recognised university with the minimum percentage prescribed in the brochure. Some specific combinations of school subjects may be required for B.Ed eligibility.
Candidates must hold a Bachelor degree (Arts / Science / Commerce or equivalent) from a recognised university with the minimum percentage prescribed in the brochure.
Some specific combinations of school subjects may be required for B.Ed eligibility.

Reservation and Relaxation Category-wise reservation (SC / ST / SEBC / PwD / others) is provided as per Government of Odisha norms. Relaxation in minimum qualifying marks is available for reserved categories as detailed in the brochure.
Category-wise reservation (SC / ST / SEBC / PwD / others) is provided as per Government of Odisha norms.
Relaxation in minimum qualifying marks is available for reserved categories as detailed in the brochure.
Age and Other Conditions Maximum age limit and cut off date, if any, are indicated in the B.Ed information brochure. Candidates must satisfy domicile or other conditions wherever specified.
Maximum age limit and cut off date, if any, are indicated in the B.Ed information brochure.
Candidates must satisfy domicile or other conditions wherever specified.

sections.heading: How to Check Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 at te.samsodisha.gov.in

content.text: Candidates can easily verify the official SAMS Odisha B.Ed Exam Date 2026 through the Teacher Education portal. A clear stepwise section helps target “how to check exam date” searches.

items: Visit the Teacher Education portal of SAMS Odisha at te.samsodisha.gov.in.
On the homepage, look for the B.Ed section under Teacher Education admissions.
Click on the link for the Information Brochure for 2-year B.Ed course 2026-27 or equivalent exam notice.
Open the brochure PDF and scroll to the section mentioning the Entrance Examination Date / Schedule.
Note the exam date, session and reporting time carefully for your reference.
Keep checking the portal for any updated notices or changes related to the exam schedule.

content.text: End this section with a one-line note advising students to always go by the latest brochure and official notifications.

sections.heading: Odisha B.Ed Admit Card 2026 - Key Instructions

content.text: As soon as the exam date is announced, users start searching for admit card details.
You can cover:

items: Admit card will be issued online through the SAMS Odisha TE portal before the exam date as per the schedule mentioned in the brochure.
Candidates must log in using their registered mobile number / email and password or application ID to download the B.Ed admit card.
The admit card will mention exam date, time, venue, reporting time, roll number and important instructions.
Candidates should carry a printed copy of the admit card along with valid photo ID on the exam day.

sections.heading: Official Website & Useful Links for SAMS Odisha B.Ed 2026

content.text: This section helps navigational intent searches.

items: Official Teacher Education (TE) Portal: Click Here
2-year B.Ed Information Brochure 2026-27: Click Here
